## Plan for Pixel-AI

Tools:

- Slurm: job management system on the cloud server

- Docker: for building pipeline?

- Weights & Biases: to track the experiments

- [Question: How to remotely control the lab workstation]{.mark}?

 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 **Task** **People** **Comments**
 --------------- --------------------------- ------------ ------------------------
 Part 0 Prepare TMA cores, provide Fer 
 a list of channels 

 Set up work station & cloud Ziqi, Matias 
 server 

 Set up the GitHub DONE
 repository 

 Setup Weights & Biases Matias DONE
 platform for tracking 
 experiments 

 Setting up 
 tools and 
 environments 
 should be done 
 before **Nov 
 17th** 

 Part 1 Split TMA images into Ziqi, Explainable could be a
 patches (compare different Matias, problem for latent space
 sizes?), choose proper Angela 
 metrics to evaluate 

 Setting up the VAE pipeline TBA 

 Meet on **Nov 
 27th**: check 
 the results, 
 brainstorm, and 
 discuss the 
 problems we 
 found 

 

 Meet with Esa 
 on **Dec 7th, 
 13.00-14.00** 

 
 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

P.S. We also discussed the plan for Lapland :P
